articles.title: Children's Health Defense Exposes Big Pharma's War on Ivermectin Cancer Studies

articles.title: Rice University Scientist Gets 15-Year Ban: Research Integrity Office Finally Acts on Decade-Old Fraud
articles.summary: The Office of Research Integrity hands down a 15-year debarment to former Rice University chemist Ariel Fernández for intentionally fabricating data. The case took 17 years to resolve, exposing the glacial pace of academic accountability and widespread tolerance for scientific fraud.

articles.title: FDA Crushes ImmunityBio After Misleading Cancer Claims: $2B Market Cap Vaporized
